selections.name: Founders
selections.reason: Strong late kick sets up perfectly for a contested pace scenario. Upgraded class rating based on recent form.

selections.name: Chillax
selections.reason: Consistent presser who should get the first run on the deep closers if the early speed duel materializes.

selections.name: Mcafee
selections.reason: Classy type dropping in class. Will benefit from the pace meltdown and has back class to factor.

selections.name: Fact
selections.reason: Dangerous early speed but may face pressure. Downgraded slightly due to pace dynamics but still a major threat.

danger_horse.name: Nogradi
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and tactical speed makes him a threat to hit the board at a price.

selections.name: Timbertop
selections.reason: Only runner with experience and posted a solid 97 speed figure on debut. Clear standout against first-time starters.

selections.name: Charlotte's Beach
selections.reason: First-time starter for Mark Casse with Jose Ortiz aboard. Strong pedigree for the surface.

selections.name: Girls Wear Pearls
selections.reason: Debuting for Jena Antonucci with Flavien Prat. Works suggest readiness.

selections.name: Rockabye
selections.reason: Outside draw is favorable on the Mellon Turf. Clement/Franco combo is lethal with debut turf runners.

danger_horse.name: Pavlova's Palace (GB)
danger_horse.reason: European pedigree debuting for Bill Mott. Cannot be ignored on the grass.

selections.name: Mo For The King

selections.name: Anyway
selections.reason: Strong early speed figures. Will be the one to catch but faces pace pressure.

selections.name: Fireballin
selections.reason: Consistent presser who can capitalize if the pace gets too hot up front.

selections.name: The Toy Cannon

danger_horse.name: B Provocateur
danger_horse.reason: Capable of closing into a hot pace if the leaders tire.

selections.name: Private Flight
selections.reason: Class relief and strong recent figures make him the one to beat in this spot.

selections.name: Trail Blaze
selections.reason: Consistent runner with tactical speed. Should get a great trip from the inside.

selections.name: Restless Renegade
selections.reason: Outside draw is a plus. Has shown enough late foot to factor here.

selections.name: Mr R T
selections.reason: Prat takes the mount. Capable of outrunning his odds with a clean break.

danger_horse.name: Ryan's Shadow
danger_horse.reason: Gets class relief and could wake up at a price.

selections.reason: Massive speed figure advantage. Looks like a standout based on recent turf sprint form.

selections.name: Oscar's Encore

selections.name: One More Guitar

selections.name: Paula's A Star
selections.reason: Consistent performer who rarely runs a bad race. Must include in exotics.

danger_horse.name: Minute By Minute
danger_horse.reason: Prat rides from the rail. Dangerous if she can work out a trip.

selections.name: Polar Bear Plunge

selections.name: Metatron's Muse

selections.name: Prove Worthy

danger_horse.name: Catch The Smoke

selections.name: Belgian

selections.name: Silver Talent

selections.name: White Smoke Rising
